sections.heading: Overview
sections.summary: Source: `apps/command-center/src/content/docs/architecture/pipeline-overview.md` — full body indexed for agent retrieval.

sections.heading: Article
sections.summary: Most OSINT tools share the same pipeline. Design yours as composable layers so you can swap adapters without rewriting the UI.

sections.heading: High-level model
entities:
txt
Input → Source Adapter → Collector → Parser → Normalizer → Enricher → Correlator → Storage → UI/Report

sections.heading: Input layer
sections.summary: Accepts the starting point for a task.

sections.heading: Source adapter layer
sections.summary: Connects to a specific **public** source. See [Source adapters](/docs/architecture/source-adapters) and the [adapter catalog](/docs/adapters/search-engines).

sections.heading: Parsing layer
sections.summary: Turns messy source data into structured records.

sections.heading: Normalization layer
sections.summary: Converts source-specific data into common entities. See [Normalization](/docs/architecture/normalization).

sections.heading: Enrichment layer
sections.summary: Adds context to an entity. See [Enrichment](/docs/architecture/enrichment).

sections.heading: Correlation layer
sections.summary: Connects entities into a graph or relationship table. See [Correlation](/docs/architecture/correlation).

sections.heading: Storage layer
sections.summary: Persists raw data, normalized data, and analysis. See [Storage](/docs/architecture/storage).

sections.heading: UI / report layer
sections.summary: Presents findings: evidence cards, entity graph, timeline, source table, confidence badges, map view, diff viewer, exportable report. See [UI components](/docs/ui/entity-card).
